See [.copilot/master.prompt.md](../.copilot/master.prompt.md) and [.copilot/config.yaml](../.copilot/config.yaml).

All work in this repository follows the agents, skills, and feedback loop defined under `.copilot/`. Load `master.prompt.md` first, then the relevant `agents/<role>.md`, then any referenced `skills/*.md`. The Principal Reviewer is the only role that can mark work complete.
